first_paragraph: **Mathias Toon Cecil Willy De Clercq**[[1]](#cite_note-1) (born 26 December 1981, [Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent")) is a [Belgian](/wiki/Belgians "Belgians") [politician](/wiki/Politician "Politician"). He is a member of the [Flemish liberal party](/wiki/Open_Flemish_Liberals_and_Democrats "Open Flemish Liberals and Democrats"). At the moment he is the [mayor of Ghent](/wiki/List_of_mayors_of_Ghent "List of mayors of Ghent"). From 2007 until 2014,[[2]](#cite_note-2) he was a [federal representative](/wiki/List_of_members_of_the_Chamber_of_Representatives_of_Belgium "List of members of the Chamber of Representatives of Belgium"), and from 2014 until 2019, he was a Flemish representative. From 2007 until 2019, he was a *[schepen](/wiki/Schepen "Schepen")* in [Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent"). He belongs to the social liberal wing of his party.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Flemish politician

| Mathias De Clercq | |
| --- | --- |
| [Mathias De Clercq](/wiki/File:DeClercq_Mathias_04.jpg) Mathias De Clercq | |
| Born | Mathias De Clercq  1981 (age 44–45)  Ghent |
| Occupation | politician |
| Known for | Mayor of Ghent and President of Eurocities |

**Mathias Toon Cecil Willy De Clercq**[[1]](#cite_note-1) (born 26 December 1981, [Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent")) is a [Belgian](/wiki/Belgians "Belgians") [politician](/wiki/Politician "Politician"). He is a member of the [Flemish liberal party](/wiki/Open_Flemish_Liberals_and_Democrats "Open Flemish Liberals and Democrats"). At the moment he is the [mayor of Ghent](/wiki/List_of_mayors_of_Ghent "List of mayors of Ghent"). From 2007 until 2014,[[2]](#cite_note-2) he was a [federal representative](/wiki/List_of_members_of_the_Chamber_of_Representatives_of_Belgium "List of members of the Chamber of Representatives of Belgium"), and from 2014 until 2019, he was a Flemish representative. From 2007 until 2019, he was a *[schepen](/wiki/Schepen "Schepen")* in [Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent"). He belongs to the social liberal wing of his party.

De Clercq was born in [Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent"), son of lawyer and alderman Yannick Frans de Clercq (1954), grand officer of the [Order of Leopold II](/wiki/Order_of_Leopold_II "Order of Leopold II").[[3]](#cite_note-3) He is the grandson of Viscount [Willy De Clercq](/wiki/Willy_De_Clercq "Willy De Clercq"), a former [European Commissioner](/wiki/European_Commissioner "European Commissioner").

Since June 2025 De Clercq has also served as President of the [Eurocities](/wiki/Eurocities "Eurocities") network.[[4]](#cite_note-4)
